title: rubus peninsulae
intro: Rubus peninsulae, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Western Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the genus Rubus. It is native to the Himalayan region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus peninsulae include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
